Container.Name: PrintStash-API
Container.Overview: Backend for PrintStash, an open-source self-hosted 3D print library and G-code vault. Stores STL, 3MF, OBJ, STEP/STP, G-code, and BGCODE files plus searchable metadata, thumbnails, collections, tags, revisions, print history, user access, printer connections, and backups. PrintStash adds content-hash duplicate detection, slicer metadata extraction, NAS/shared-volume indexing, G-code outcome tracking, printer workflows, measured usage, cost tracking, and optional Spoolman integration. Install with PrintStash-Frontend on the same user-defined Docker network named "printstash"; the frontend reaches this container as hostname "api". Set a strong VAULT_JWT_SECRET before first start. Configure local or S3-compatible storage and backups in the setup wizard.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: 3d printer 3d printing model manager stl library 3mf gcode bgcode step stp obj cad file organizer self hosted docker nas klipper moonraker octoprint prusalink bambu elegoo spoolman orcaslicer prusaslicer cura print history
Container.PostArgs: /bin/sh -c "uv run alembic upgrade head && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --no-access-log --proxy-headers"
Container.Requires: Create a user-defined Docker network named "printstash" first (Settings -> Docker, or `docker network create printstash`). Install PrintStash-Frontend on the same network.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: Optional. Only needed if you want to hit the API or /metrics directly. The frontend reaches it internally via the printstash network.

Config.Name: JWT secret
Config.Description: REQUIRED. A long random string used to sign auth tokens. Generate one, e.g. `openssl rand -hex 32`.

Config.Name: Max upload (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum upload size in MB. Keep in sync with the frontend NGINX_CLIENT_MAX_BODY_SIZE.

Config.Name: Metrics token
Config.Description: Optional. If set, the Prometheus /metrics endpoint requires this bearer token. Leave empty to keep it open on your LAN.
